code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    let token = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let sq = v * v
    if i == 0
      result = "#{sq}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{sq}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end
